calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Juana Guitierrez (Respondent). Javier Gutierrez (Respondent's Son).

The Court noted that it is 1:40 p.m. and that Josefina Enea (Petitioner) is not present to provide evidence to support her petition, the Request for Restraining Order is denied. The case is dismissed.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton.

After the Court's Ruling, Mr. Gutierrez stated that the Petitioner is threating his mother. The Court stated that the matter is not before the Court and advised the Respondent to file a petition.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Peter Busch, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petitioner: Josefina Enea, present in pro per.

Respondent: Juana Gutierrez, present in pro per.
Respondent's Witness: Javier Gutierrez, was also present.

The Parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is DENIED for the reasons set forth on the record.
